Projects

W-C Deposition Device

Device for simultaneous tungsten-carbon film deposition.

Hydrogen Retention in Tore-Supra Tiles

Study of hydrogen retention in Tore-Supra tokamak tiles.

Tungsten-Carbon Film Growth Model

Modeling growth of W-C films during dual sputtering.

Oxygen Removal from Graphite Wall

Glow discharge cleaning parameters for oxygen removal.

Cell Adhesion Study

Prototype to measure cell adhesion forces using automated tracking.

Plasma Device Control Unit

Open-source control and acquisition unit for plasma experiments.

X-ray Filter for Non-destructive Inspection

Improved X-ray filter design for weld inspection.

Permeation Experiments in QUEST

Hydrogen flux measurements with membrane probes in QUEST tokamak.

Carbon impurity flow in LHD

Analysis of carbon impurity transport in LHD peripheral plasma.

Boron powder plasma sputtering

Prototype sputtering device for boron powder deposition.

Hydrogen Molecule Spectroscopy

Spectroscopy of hydrogen molecule populations in LHD plasma.

Seawater Desalination Device

Renewable-powered multi-effect evaporation desalination system.

GUI for Echelle Spectrometer Image processing

PyQt GUI converts 2D echelle images to calibrated spectra.

Oxygen Effect on Hydrogen Retention in Graphites

Oxygen addition drastically increases hydrogen retention in graphites.

Fulcher-alpha Emission Analizer

Python tool for analyzing molecular hydrogen Fulcher-alpha emission.
